response.justification: The candidate demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS, with direct alignment to the required stack and responsibilities including AI-agent infrastructure, API integrations, and scalable system design. Their hands-on work with testing frameworks, containerization, and cross-platform development shows strong engineering rigor, though lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention is a minor gap.
strengths: Proven full-stack delivery across frontend (React, Ember.js) and backend (Node.js, DLang, Java) with real-world scale
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators
Strong DevOps and infrastructure experience with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and GitLab setup
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though Node.js and testing experience are present
Limited detail on relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) despite listed SQL skills
German language proficiency is basic, which may affect collaboration in Berlin-based teams
